items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon Sees Rising Regulatory Risk for Card Networks Such as Visa (V)
items.description: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) is one of the best stocks to buy and hold for 20 years. On January 21, 2026, JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon warned that customer access to credit could be sharply curtailed following a proposed 10% cap on U.S. credit card interest rates. According to him, the move could mean the removal of […]

items.title: Are You on Track With the Net Worth and Income of America's Top 10%?
items.description: To be in the top 10% in the U.S., you must earn at least $210,000 per year or have at least $1.8 million of net worth.

items.title: Uber CEO Once Called Bitcoin A 'Proven Commodity,' But Found These Cryptos More 'Practical' For This Reason
items.description: Uber Technologies Inc. (NYSE:UBER) CEO Dara Khosrowshahi once stressed the importance of embracing cryptocurrencies for practical purposes rather than as a “store of value.”
